articles.summary: Constellation Brands withdrew its previously issued fiscal 2028 outlook on Wednesday and reported "subdued" demand across its categories.

articles.title: Family offices piled into oil after capital dried up. The recent rally has made for big gains
articles.summary: After ESG pressures forced private equity investors out of oil and gas, investment firms of ultra-wealthy families stepped up.

articles.title: Olympic skier Lindsey Vonn doesn't rule out the 2030 games: 'I would only do it if I could be fast'
articles.summary: Lindsey Vonn told CNBC Sport she's not ruling out a return to the Olympics in 2030, at age 45, if she can still perform at a high level.

articles.title: Goldman Sachs tops estimates on record equities trading
articles.summary: Goldman Sachs posted record equities trading revenue for the first quarter, helping propel the overall firm to its second-highest quarterly revenue.

articles.title: "Może przynieść bardzo pozytywne wyniki". Twórca giganta zabiera głos ws. Mercosuru
articles.summary: Umowa UE z krajami Mercosur - czyli Argentyną, Brazylią, Paragwajem i Urugwajem - wprowadza preferencje celne dla niektórych produktów rolnych pochodzących z krajów Mercosuru, w tym wołowiny, drobiu, nabiału, cukru i etanolu. W zamian rynki tych państw otworzą się na towary przemysło

articles.title: Bloomberg: PKO BP rozważa wejście na Węgry. Zachęciło zwycięstwo Magyara
articles.summary: PKO BP przyspiesza analizy na temat możliwości otwarcia oddziału na Węgrzech - podaje w poniedziałek agencja Bloomberga. Jak tłumaczy agencja, wpływ na tę decyzję ma zwycięstwo partii Tisza i związana z tym nadzieja na bardziej stabilne przepisy.

articles.title: Wall Street still loves streaming, but are its affections well placed?
articles.summary: While streaming continues to drive media stocks, especially around quarterly earnings, it's not clear when it will start driving profits for smaller players.

articles.title: Revolution Medicines says its potential breakthrough pancreatic cancer drug succeeds in late-stage trial
articles.summary: Revolution Medicines' drug for pancreatic cancer succeeded in a highly anticipated Phase 3 trial, the company said.

articles.title: How Kodak is trying to turn around its business after teetering on bankruptcy
articles.summary: Photography company Eastman Kodak has seen its fair share of financial struggles, but CEO Jim Continenza is determined to fuel its success.

articles.title: Delta Air Lines unveils first new Delta One suite in premium cabin arms race
articles.summary: Delta and other carriers are ramping up premium seats on board.

articles.title: Ineos Automotive: Startup backed by a knighted billionaire and soccer mogul wants to rekindle the rugged SUV market
articles.summary: The automaker has plans to grow sales in the U.S. by roughly 30% to 35%, as well as a target to achieve breakeven this year, executives exclusively told CNBC.

articles.title: The Masters has become the biggest event of the year for private jet companies
articles.summary: Private jet companies are competing for high-spending customers with lavish on-the-ground experiences near the golf course.
